2015-2017.notable_shifts: Streetwear enters high fashion. Athleisure becomes acceptable office wear. Gender-fluid fashion gains mainstream attention.
2015-2017.social_media_impact: Instagram becomes primary fashion discovery platform. Influencer marketing explodes.

2018-2020.notable_shifts: COVID-19 reshapes fashion: comfort-first dressing, loungewear boom, decline of formal wear. Sustainability becomes a major consumer concern.
2018-2020.social_media_impact: TikTok emerges as fashion trend driver. #OOTD culture peaks on Instagram.

2021-2023.notable_shifts: Post-pandemic fashion split: maximalism vs stealth wealth. Vintage and thrifting go mainstream. AI enters fashion design.
2021-2023.social_media_impact: TikTok microtrends create rapid trend cycles. 'Cores' and aesthetics culture dominates (cottagecore, darkcore, etc.).

2024-2026.notable_shifts: AI-driven personalization in fashion retail. Micro-trends cycle faster than ever. Sustainability shifts from marketing to regulation. Cultural fashion fusion accelerates globally.
2024-2026.social_media_impact: TikTok Shop transforms fashion commerce. AI styling tools go mainstream. Pinterest predicts trends with data analytics.
